summary: Building InnerLift Wellness website from scratch — a mental wellness blog/website with homepage (hero, categories, blog posts, affirmations, newsletter), About Us page, and three category sections (Stress Management, Motivational Stories, Work-Life Balance). User requested a new logo.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- InnerLift Wellness brand logo featuring a stylized upward-lift or lotus/leaf motif in soft sage green and warm teal tones, with clean modern sans-serif wordmark 'InnerLift Wellness' beside the icon (innerlift-logo.dim_300x80.png)
- InnerLift Wellness favicon — minimal icon version of the logo mark only, no text, on transparent background (innerlift-favicon.dim_64x64.png)

existing_features.title: Display the generated InnerLift Wellness logo image (innerlift-logo.dim_300x80.png) in the Navigation component as the site brand logo, replacing any existing logo or text-only brand mark.

new_feature_requests.summary: Build InnerLift Wellness website from scratch with full homepage, About Us page, and three category sections
Create a new logo for InnerLift Wellness
